description: Bears automatic CD tooling package with the MCP Designer skill. It is not a workspace instruction authority.

interface.longDescription: This package provides one automatic CD executor, two machine-readable contract-shape files, and the mcp-designer skill for MCP surface design/review. Plugin skills are task procedures; workspace behavior remains owned by active AGENTS.md files and non-plugin contracts.
interface.shortDescription: Bears automatic CD tooling plus MCP Designer skill.
defaultPrompt: Use $mcp-designer to design an MCP server surface before implementation.
Use $mcp-designer to review MCP tools, resources, prompts, schemas, and startup limits.

name: bears
